jobs.title: Senior Information Security Engineer
jobs.summary: A leading financial services organisation is seeking a Senior Information Security Engineer to join its growing technology team.
jobs.brief_description: A leading financial services organisation is seeking a Senior Information Security Engineer to join its growing technology team.
jobs.detail_description: This is a strategic, hands-on role responsible for designing, implementing, and optimising advanced security architecture across hybrid infrastructure, applications, and cloud environments. The successful candidate will act as a technical security leader, driving engineering initiatives, leading complex incident response efforts, and strengthening enterprise-wide security posture. This opportunity is ideal for a senior security professional who combines deep technical expertise with strategic thinking and leadership capability. Key Responsibilities: Security Architecture & Engineering: Design and implement advanced security controls across on-prem, cloud, and SaaS environments (Azure and Microsoft 365) . Define and enforce security architecture standards. Review new technology integrations for compliance and security alignment. Configure and maintain enterprise firewalls and Web Application Firewalls (WAF) . Champion secure development lifecycle practices and conduct advanced application security assessments. Security Operations Leadership: Oversee and optimise tools, including SIEM, EDR, DLP, firewalls, and vulnerability management platforms . Develop automation strategies for threat detection and response (PowerShell and Python). Establish operational playbooks and mentor junior engineers. Collaborate with outsourced SOC providers and manage SLAs and performance metrics. Integrate SOC services into the broader security operations framework. Incident Response & Threat Management: Lead major incident investigations, forensic analysis, and root cause determination. Act as escalation point for critical security events. Drive proactive threat hunting and advanced analytics initiatives. Vulnerability & Patch Management: Define and manage enterprise vulnerability management strategy. Deliver executive-level reporting on risk exposure and remediation progress. Identity & Access Management: Architect and enforce identity governance using Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) . Implement zero-trust and privileged access management strategies. Compliance & Risk Advisory: Ensure alignment with ISO 27001, NIST CSF, CIS benchmarks, POPIA, GDPR, and FSCA . Lead technical audits, penetration testing engagements, and red/blue team exercises. Provide authoritative guidance on risk mitigation strategies. Executive Reporting: Deliver strategic dashboards, risk metrics, and Board-level presentations. Recommend and implement continuous security posture improvements. Qualifications & Experience: Education & Certifications: Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or a related field. CISSP, CISM, or equivalent senior-level certifications . Microsoft security certifications (e.g., Cybersecurity Architect Expert / SC-series) advantageous. Experience: 7+ years in cybersecurity or security engineering roles. Minimum 3 years in a senior/lead capacity . Expert-level experience with SIEM, EDR, firewalls, DLP, and vulnerability management platforms . Hands-on firewall configuration and WAF deployment experience. Strong cloud security expertise (Azure and Microsoft 365). Experience leading incident response and security architecture projects. Strong scripting and automation skills (PowerShell and Python). Advantageous: Exposure to Hillstone technologies, NGINX, Microsoft Intune, Microsoft Purview, and advanced SIEM solutions. Key Competencies: Strategic and analytical thinker. Strong documentation and organisational skills. Able to mentor and develop junior engineers. jobs.title: Developer
jobs.summary: Developers Wanted – Build, Ship, and Scale in 2026.
jobs.brief_description: Developers Wanted – Build, Ship, and Scale in 2026.
jobs.detail_description: 2026 is shaping up to be a big year for tech. Companies are rebuilding platforms, modernising legacy systems, moving deeper into cloud, and doubling down on automation, security, and data. If you’re a Developer with a few years of real-world experience under your belt, this is the perfect time to explore what’s next — whether that’s a stronger team, better projects, a modern stack, or a role with more ownership. You’ve moved beyond “just writing code”. You’re solving problems, improving systems, and shipping work that actually makes a difference. The Market Is Hiring — Especially for Builders! Across enterprise teams and fast-moving product environments, demand is growing for engineers who can: ✅ deliver production-ready features; ✅ contribute to scalable architecture; ✅ work confidently in modern dev environments; ✅ collaborate with strong engineering teams; and ✅ improve performance, reliability, and security. We’re currently connecting with Developers and IT professionals who are open to new roles in 2026 — not just job changes, but real career upgrades. What Companies Are Looking For Right Now: We’re especially keen to speak to professionals who can: Build and maintain modern web and application platforms Work across back-end, front-end, or full stack development Develop cloud-native services and scalable systems Apply DevOps practices (CI/CD, automation, deployment and pipelines) Strengthen performance, security, and reliability Work in Agile teams with strong delivery culture What You Bring: You’ll stand out if you have: A relevant IT qualification or strong hands-on experience Solid coding fundamentals and good engineering habits Exposure to modern frameworks, tooling, and cloud platforms Confidence working in fast-paced environments A mindset focused on clean solutions and continuous learning The drive to take the next step into more complex work and bigger responsibility 🌍 Why 2026 Is The Moment: Tech is central to every business strategy — and companies are actively hiring the talent that will help them scale, modernise, and stay competitive. This is your chance to move into a role where your: Work has real impact Skills are recognised Growth is supported Tech stack doesn’t hold you back Let’s Talk! If you’re a Developer or IT professional who’s open to exploring new opportunities, benchmarking your market value, or stepping into a stronger role in 2026 — I’d love to connect. For more IT vacancies, please visit: 👉 https://www.networkrecruitmentinternational.com/it I specialise in recruiting for: Software Developers (Java, .NET, Python, Full Stack) DevOps & Cloud Engineers Cybersecurity Specialists Data & Analytics Professionals Infrastructure & Systems Engineers Technical Project & Product Roles If you have not received a response within two weeks, please consider your application unsuccessful. Your profile will be retained on our database for future suitable opportunities. For more information, contact: Ally-Jane Volmink Specialist Recruitment Consultant Connect with me on LinkedIn: 👉 www.linkedin.com/in/ally-jane-volmink-19185925b

jobs.title: Release and DevOps Specialist
jobs.summary: The Release and DevOps Specialist will be responsible for ensuring smooth, reliable and repeatable software releases from development, through to staging and production. It bridges the gap between dev
jobs.brief_description: The Release and DevOps Specialist will be responsible for ensuring smooth, reliable and repeatable software releases from development, through to staging and production. It bridges the gap between development, QA and operations by managing release processes, automating deployments and maintaining a stable environment.
jobs.detail_description: Key Responsibilities: Own and manage the release calendar, coordinating with products owners, Developers, and QA Plan, document and communicate release schedules and content Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps Automate deployment to dev, staging and production environments Maintain dev, staging and production environments to ensure parity and stability Act as the first line of investigation for staging issues (deployment / config / data), escalating that true code defects back to the Devs Partner with QA to ensure that test environments are production-like Job Experience and Skills Required: 3-5 years' experience in a similar role Strong CI/CD pipeline in Azure DevOps experience Hands-on experience with automated deployments for .NET / Blazor / SQL Server Strong troubleshooting skills across code, config and environment layers, and experience with source control Apply now! For more IT jobs, please visit www.networkrecruitmentinternational.com/ I also specialise in recruiting in the following: Software Development Data Engineer Data Analyst Infrastructure Architecture ... and more! If you have not had any response in two weeks, please consider the vacancy application unsuccessful. Your profile will be kept on our database for any other suitable roles / positions. For more information contact: Monica de Wet Senior Recruitment Consultant Connect with me on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/monica-de-wet-recruitment/

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer (JavaScript, React)
jobs.location: Western Cape > Cape Town: Northern Suburbs
jobs.summary: A purpose-driven organisation is looking for a self-motivated Software Developer to join a technology team focused on building systems that support large-scale operations and data-driven campaigns acr
jobs.brief_description: A purpose-driven organisation is looking for a self-motivated Software Developer to join a technology team focused on building systems that support large-scale operations and data-driven campaigns across South Africa.
jobs.detail_description: This role suits someone who wants to use technology to create real-world impact while working in a fast-paced, outcome-focused environment. Key Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain front-end and back-end systems aligned to organisational objectives. Build web applications using React and Node.js . Support the deployment and ongoing use of the organisation’s software infrastructure. Extract, transform, and analyse operational data for reporting purposes. Develop systems to track project and campaign performance. Support internal users with technical solutions. Contribute to improving development pipelines, deployment processes, and best practices. Minimum Requirements: Tertiary qualification in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Systems , or a relevant practical qualification. Minimum 2 years’ experience in software development using JavaScript / TypeScript . At least 1 years' experience developing front-ends with React and back-ends using Node.js . Experience with SQL databases . Understanding of software development principles, methodologies, and best practice. Knowledge of version control, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment processes . Skills: Strong programming capability. Analytical and structured problem-solving ability. Good organisation and planning skills. High attention to detail. Abilities: Outcomes-oriented mindset. Able to work under pressure. Comfortable working independently. Applies sound judgement. Able to work effectively in a demanding environment, including irregular hours when required. Commitment: Willingness to go the extra mile to deliver results. Comfortable working extended or irregular hours when operational needs require it. What’s On Offer: Opportunity to work on meaningful, high-impact systems. Exposure to modern full stack technologies. Fast-paced, collaborative environment. Market-related remuneration. Apply Now! For more information contact: Raees Sadek IT Recruitment Researcher 011 622 9526

jobs.title: PHP Developer
jobs.summary: A leading software solutions provider in Pretoria is looking for an Intermediate PHP Developer to join a growing development team working on enterprise-scale, cloud-based platforms used within the fin
jobs.brief_description: A leading software solutions provider in Pretoria is looking for an Intermediate PHP Developer to join a growing development team working on enterprise-scale, cloud-based platforms used within the financial and legal services environment. Here's the best part, this is a fully remote role!
jobs.detail_description: This role is ideal for a Developer who enjoys building robust, scalable systems, working with modern PHP frameworks, and collaborating within a highly capable technical team. The business focuses strongly on long-term growth, employee retention, and continuous skills development. Key Responsibilities: Develop and maintain features for a PHP-based enterprise platform. Build and integrate REST and GraphQL APIs with third-party systems. Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code aligned to best practices. Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement. Write and maintain automated tests to ensure quality and stability. Collaborate with team members to troubleshoot and resolve technical issues. Contribute to front-end components using Vue 3 where required. Document technical solutions and support internal knowledge sharing. Technical Skills: Essential: PHP 8.x , Laravel JavaScript, Vue.js MySQL REST or GraphQL APIs Git, Composer, and npm PHPUnit (unit & feature testing) Basic Linux & Docker knowledge Advantageous: TypeScript Vue 3 Composition API Redis / Memcached CI/CD (GitLab) WebSockets / real-time features MySQL 8.x Experience Required: 2–4 years' PHP development experience. Hands-on Laravel experience in a production environment. Experience building or consuming APIs (REST / GraphQL). Exposure to Vue.js or similar front-end frameworks. Comfortable writing automated tests. Solid understanding of Git workflows (branching, merge requests, and code reviews). Personal Attributes: Eager to learn and grow technical skills. Takes ownership of tasks and delivers on commitments. Communicates progress and blockers clearly. Receptive to feedback and coaching. Strong problem-solving mindset with attention to detail. What’s On Offer: Work on enterprise-scale production systems. Collaborative, technically strong development environment. Long-term career growth and mentorship. Exposure to modern PHP, API, and cloud technologies. Market-related salary based on experience. Apply Now! For more information contact: Raees Sadek IT Recruitment Researcher 011 622 9526

jobs.title: Senior Data Analyst (Pricing)
jobs.summary: I am recruiting for a Senior Manager: Product Performance Analysis & Costing to join a well-established financial services environment. This role suits a commercially minded analytics leader who enjoy
jobs.brief_description: I am recruiting for a Senior Manager: Product Performance Analysis & Costing to join a well-established financial services environment. This role suits a commercially minded analytics leader who enjoys working at the intersection of data, finance, pricing, and product performance, while managing and developing a team of analysts.
jobs.detail_description: The successful candidate will play a key role in delivering high-quality analytics, financial models, and insight that supports sustainable, transparent, and profitable product performance. Role Overview: You will be responsible for leading a small team of analysts and implementing analytics solutions across the full data lifecycle — from data preparation and modelling through to insight delivery and executive reporting. The role works closely with finance and operational teams to guide pricing, costing structures, and overall product financial performance. Key Responsibilities: Manage and maintain the analytics database and SQL models Build and enhance financial models for product performance and pricing Prepare, analyse, and present product performance insights for management and financial reporting Analyse economic factors and risks impacting product pricing Conduct claims and performance analysis on financial products Lead, mentor, and develop junior analysts Prepare budgets and fund-related financial data Support audits and external valuators with data preparation and queries Contribute to finance and product performance committees Maintain documentation and continuously improve analytical processes Automate monthly reporting processes with BI support Deliver ad hoc analysis to support adjacent teams Essential Requirements (Non-Negotiable): Degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, or another quantitative discipline 5+ years’ experience in analytics, financial modelling, or product performance analysis Proven management or team leadership experience Strong SQL / database experience Advanced Excel skills Exposure to Python and/or R for statistical or analytical modelling Experience working with financial services, insurance, or financial products (advantageous) Strong communication and presentation skills for senior stakeholders High attention to detail and strong commercial thinking Key Competencies: Strong analytical and logical problem-solving ability Comfortable working with minimal supervision Able to perform under pressure and meet reporting deadlines High integrity and accountability Strong collaboration and team leadership skills Apply Now! For more information contact: Raees Sadek IT Recruitment Researcher 011 622 9526

jobs.title: Back-End C# Software Developer
jobs.summary: I work with leading, high-growth digital and technology businesses in South Africa and abroad, and I’m continuously building a talent network of strong Software Developers to connect with for fu
jobs.brief_description: I work with leading, high-growth digital and technology businesses in South Africa and abroad, and I’m continuously building a talent network of strong Software Developers to connect with for future opportunities as they become available.
jobs.detail_description: Who This Is For: I’m keen to connect with Developers who enjoy working on scalable, modern platforms and distributed systems, including: Building .NET-based applications, APIs and services Working with C#, .Net Core, ASP.NET MVC and Web APIs Designing microservices architectures Integrating with message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka, and Service Bus) Working with SQL Server, Entity Framework Core and Dapper Implementing CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps Collaborating with product, business and engineering teams Writing clean, maintainable, production-ready code Technologies Often Seen In My Clients' Environments: .NET 5+ / .Net Core C# 8+ ASP.NET MVC & REST APIs Elasticsearch SQL Server, EF Core, and Dapper RabbitMQ / Kafka / Azure Service Bus Azure DevOps (Repos, Pipelines, and Releases) Angular, React or Vue Redis / distributed caching Microservices architecture The Kind Of Developers My Clients Look For: Strong communication and collaboration Ownership and accountability Adaptability in fast-paced environments High attention to detail and quality Initiative and problem-solving mindset Team orientation and integrity Why Join A Talent Pool?: Be considered for future roles before they go public Get approached only for relevant, aligned opportunities Build a relationship with a Recruiter who understands your tech stack and career direction Stay connected to the market without actively job hunting Apply Now! For more information contact: Raees Sadek IT Recruitment Researcher 011 622 9526

jobs.title: Senior Python Developer
jobs.summary: We are recruiting for a Senior Python Developer to join a technically strong and established development team. This role is ideal for an experienced Back-End Developer with a passion for building scal
jobs.brief_description: We are recruiting for a Senior Python Developer to join a technically strong and established development team. This role is ideal for an experienced Back-End Developer with a passion for building scalable systems, APIs, and cloud-enabled solutions.Important: This position is 100% office-based in Bryanston and requires a minimum of 5 years professional experience.
jobs.detail_description: Senior Python Developer Bryanston, Gauteng - Fully In-Office Key Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain back-end systems using Python (Django) Build, maintain, and optimise RESTful APIs Work extensively with MySQL , including schema design and performance optimisation Deploy and support applications in Linux environments Use Docker for containerisation and environment consistency Work with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud) for application deployment and infrastructure Collaborate with front-end developers, product owners, and other engineers Debug and troubleshoot complex application and infrastructure issues Participate in code reviews, mentor junior developers, and uphold coding standards Contribute to architectural decisions and provide technical leadership Essential Requirements (Non-Negotiable): 5+ years professional experience as a Python Developer Strong experience with Python and Django Proven experience building and maintaining APIs Solid hands-on experience with MySQL Strong experience working in Linux environments Docker experience for containerised applications Experience working with cloud platforms : AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Strong back-end and system architecture knowledge Proficiency with Git version control Willingness to work full-time in office (Bryanston, Gauteng) Nice-to-Haves: Experience with microservices architectures Exposure to message brokers such as RabbitMQ or Kafka Experience working in Agile development environments Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field Apply Now!
